title: Nextdoor describes Codex as a shift toward outcome engineering
friendlyTitle: Nextdoor uses Codex for broader engineering work
summary: OpenAI detailed how Nextdoor engineers use Codex to investigate production issues, work across frontend, backend, and mobile, and move from implementation-by-prompting toward describing outcomes and verification paths.
friendlySummary: OpenAI described how Nextdoor engineers use Codex to investigate problems and work across frontend, backend, and mobile code.
whyItMatters: AI coding agents are changing who can own a feature end to end. For product teams, this suggests smaller groups may ship more complete work if they can pair clear goals with strong testing and review.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Coding agents may help smaller teams own more complete features when goals, tests, and reviews are clear.
